primary_hook_size.note: Primary text occupies 10-25% of canvas height. Single-word hooks (ENTROPY, STOICISM, ATLANTIS)

secondary_text_size.note: Subtitles, descriptors, labels. Usually 3-5x smaller than primary.

fonts.dominant: Impact (ultra-bold condensed sans) — used in ~70% of thumbnails across all niches
fonts.secondary: Montserrat (bold sans, 700-900 weight) — used for cleaner/modern looks
fonts.accent: Playfair Display or Cinzel — serif fonts for classical/historical/calm aesthetics
fonts.rule: Never more than 2 font families per thumbnail

text_contrast.on_variable: White + black stroke (0.003-0.006) + shadow (4-8px blur). Contrast 5+

color_emphasis_technique.one_word_red: Make the KEY word red (#cc2020-#FF3333) while rest stays white. Used in: FREEZING., LUST, NOT, GODFACE
color_emphasis_technique.one_word_yellow: Yellow (#e8d020) for warning emphasis. Used in: NOT (in DO NOT JOIN)
color_emphasis_technique.background_number: Large dollar amounts at 0.25 size_ratio, 0.65 opacity, as watermark behind subject

positioning.top_anchor: Primary text at top (y_ratio 0.02-0.15) — safest from YouTube UI overlap
positioning.center_anchor: Single-word concepts dead center (y_ratio 0.38-0.50) — encyclopedic authority
positioning.right_side: Text right, subject left — follows face-then-info reading flow
positioning.bottom: Rarely used for primary text — YouTube progress bar obscures

text_rules.transform: uppercase for ~85% of primary hooks. Lowercase only for deliberate casual/rebellious tone (f*ck discipline)
text_rules.max_words: 3-4 words for primary hook. Beyond 4, use stacked lines. Single words are most powerful.

number_hooks.pattern: Specific dollar amount or extreme number as the hook
number_hooks.rule: Specific beats round ($306 > $300). Daily framing > annual. Show all zeros for

prohibition_hooks.rule: Prohibition triggers reactance — people want what they're told to avoid.

revelation_hooks.pattern: THIS IS / declarative statement revealing identity
revelation_hooks.rule: Recontextualize something familiar. Show a perspective nobody expects.

examples: HOW DO YOU HACK A GOD?
question_hooks.rule: The more audacious the question, the stronger the click. Single-word HOW? works

statement_hooks.pattern: Provocative absolute statement, often with period
statement_hooks.rule: Period at end adds finality and weight. Short = powerful. Contrarian statements

single_word_hooks.pattern: One word that IS the topic
single_word_hooks.rule: Works when the word itself carries mystery or cultural weight. Paired with a

exclusivity_hooks.rule: Implies the viewer will join an elite group by watching.

transformation_hooks.rule: Show the gap between current and aspirational state. Add specific timeframe.

awe_wonder.note: Dark base + warm gold/amber + cool teal accents. Space, science,.

horror_dread.note: Near-black base, warm amber undertones, blood-red accent. 80%+ pure.

aspiration_money.note: Green (money/growth) on dark. Gold for premium. White text on green.

danger_forbidden.note: Blood-red + pure black + yellow warning. Maximum aggression.

educational_clean.note: White/off-white background, black text, single red accent. Stands out.

conspiracy_mystery.note: Dark teal/cyan, matrix green, noir atmosphere.

classical_intellectual.note: Charcoal/museum dark, marble grey, one red or gold accent.

warm_historical.note: Golden hour tones, amber, warm browns. Classical painting colors.

cold_sci_fi.note: Deep navy/black, cool blue, metallic silver. Clinical and vast.

accent_color_rules.red: Danger, passion, rebellion, the ONE important word. Most universal accent.
accent_color_rules.yellow: Warning, caution, highlight. Used sparingly for single-word emphasis.
accent_color_rules.green: Money, growth, science, matrix/hacker. Never for horror.
accent_color_rules.teal_cyan: Digital, underground, cold tech. CRT glow, hacker vibes.
accent_color_rules.gold: Premium, historical, mythical. Serif fonts pair with gold.

composition_archetypes.name: single_word_over_dramatic_visual
composition_archetypes.description: One massive word centered over a full-bleed cinematic image that visualizes the
composition_archetypes.when_to_use: Topic name itself carries mystery or cultural weight (ENTROPY, STOICISM,
composition_archetypes.image_treatment: Full bleed, high contrast, dramatic lighting, the image IS the concept

composition_archetypes.name: text_over_dark_atmospheric_scene
composition_archetypes.description: Bold text (2-4 words) anchored at top over a dark, moody full-bleed scene
composition_archetypes.when_to_use: Horror, conspiracy, tech thrillers, ominous content
composition_archetypes.text_placement: Top of frame (y 0.02-0.12), white/red on dark, 14-18% size
composition_archetypes.image_treatment: Extremely dark (brightness 0.3-0.45), heavy vignette, single light source

composition_archetypes.name: person_left_data_right
composition_archetypes.description: Face/person occupies left third, text/numbers on right two-thirds
composition_archetypes.when_to_use: Finance, tutorials, authority-based content with specific claims
composition_archetypes.text_placement: Right side, top-right quadrant, green/white banners for money
composition_archetypes.image_treatment: Person well-lit, dark background, may include brand logos

composition_archetypes.name: before_after_split
composition_archetypes.description: 50/50 split with transformation shown left-to-right, often same person
composition_archetypes.text_placement: Labels (DAY 1 / DAY 21) at top corners, small data annotations
composition_archetypes.image_treatment: Left: desaturated/grey/cold. Right: warm/vibrant/saturated. White divider line.

composition_archetypes.name: tiered_infographic_pyramid
composition_archetypes.description: Pyramid or inverted pyramid with labeled tiers, each containing an image
composition_archetypes.when_to_use: Comprehensive explainers, rankings, era progressions, civilization scales
composition_archetypes.text_placement: Small labels (4% size) alternating left/right of tiers
composition_archetypes.image_treatment: White/clean background. Images inside tiers. Minimal design signals authority.

composition_archetypes.name: triptych_three_panel
composition_archetypes.description: Three vertical panels showing related scenes/activities side by side
composition_archetypes.text_placement: Bold header spanning all panels at top, 10-13% size
composition_archetypes.image_treatment: Each panel has distinct color tone. Dark gradient overlays at top for text zone.

composition_archetypes.name: scale_comparison_infographic
composition_archetypes.description: Cutaway or diagram with human figures for scale, price/data at top
composition_archetypes.when_to_use: Science, engineering, anything with shocking numbers or sizes
composition_archetypes.text_placement: Number/price anchored at top in dark zone, labels near scale figures
composition_archetypes.image_treatment: Clean, clinical, textbook-quality. Neutral palette. Red for scale figures.

composition_archetypes.name: collage_with_center_text_banner
composition_archetypes.description: Multi-image collage with a central text banner/overlay across the middle
composition_archetypes.text_placement: Black semi-transparent banner across center/eyes, text on banner
composition_archetypes.image_treatment: Cracked/glitched effects optional. Desaturated. Magazine/expose aesthetic.

composition_archetypes.name: tweet_card_with_proof
composition_archetypes.description: Social media card (tweet format) on one side, proof/person on the other
composition_archetypes.when_to_use: Finance tips, life advice, viral claim formats
composition_archetypes.text_placement: Short hook text on the card (Age 13+, Do this!). Red for targeting text.
composition_archetypes.image_treatment: White card on dark background. Person holding cash/results on opposite side.

composition_archetypes.name: three_panel_color_block
composition_archetypes.description: Three solid-color vertical panels with icons/graphics in each, VS between
composition_archetypes.when_to_use: Comparisons, guides, ranked lists for beginner audiences
composition_archetypes.text_placement: Only VS markers between panels. Let title carry all info text.
composition_archetypes.image_treatment: Bright triadic colors (blue/yellow/magenta). Flat graphic icons.

composition_archetypes.name: immersive_surface_view
composition_archetypes.description: As-if-you-are-there perspective, looking AT a surface or scene from within
composition_archetypes.when_to_use: Space, nature, exploration — anything where the unexpected perspective IS the
composition_archetypes.text_placement: Declarative label in dark sky/top zone: THIS IS [SUBJECT]
composition_archetypes.image_treatment: Full bleed, no borders, cinematic CGI. Perspective most viewers have never seen.

composition_archetypes.name: icon_grid_matrix
composition_archetypes.description: Grid of small icons/images with centered text overlay
composition_archetypes.when_to_use: List content (100 facts, conspiracy theories, ranked items)
composition_archetypes.text_placement: Centered text over grid, matrix green or bold white
composition_archetypes.image_treatment: Dark background, icons arranged in rows/columns, text overlay on semi-dark zone

composition_archetypes.name: distorted_portrait_conspiracy
composition_archetypes.description: B&W or glitched portrait of a real person with bold narrative text
composition_archetypes.when_to_use: True crime, conspiracy, tech mysteries, disappeared persons
composition_archetypes.text_placement: Right side, multi-line stacked, 11% size. Key word emphasized larger.
composition_archetypes.image_treatment: Glitch effects, chromatic aberration (cyan/red fringing), scan lines, B&W base

cross_niche_techniques.one_red_word: Make KEY word red (#cc2020-#FF3333), rest white. FREEZING., LUST, NOT, GODFACE.
cross_niche_techniques.one_yellow_word: Yellow (#e8d020) for warning. Used in: DO [yellow]NOT[/] JOIN.
cross_niche_techniques.period_finality: Period after short statement = verdict. FREEZING. DELUSIONAL.
cross_niche_techniques.ellipsis_cliffhanger: Trailing ... = open loop. HE KNEW TOO MUCH...
cross_niche_techniques.red_arrow: Red arrow from before to after state. Universal transformation symbol.
cross_niche_techniques.red_scale_figures: Red silhouette humans for scale comparison against objects.
cross_niche_techniques.banner_across_eyes: Semi-transparent black banner at eye level = classified/censored feel.
cross_niche_techniques.white_bg_pattern_break: White background stands out in feed of dark thumbnails. Signals clean/educational.
cross_niche_techniques.serif_for_calm: Playfair Display / Cinzel for classical/calm content with gold palette.
cross_niche_techniques.watermark_number: $1,000,000 at 0.25 size, 0.65 opacity behind subject = premium aspirational.

what_works: Single dramatic light source (side-lit, backlit, golden-hour). Never flat.
Unexpected perspective viewers haven't seen before.
Real material textures (marble, ice, cloud turbulence, rust).
Near-monochrome with ONE saturated accent color.
Include scale indicators (human figure, known object).
what_fails: Flat illustrative/clip-art style with even lighting.
Text baked into AI image (always overlay separately).
Generic backgrounds not specific to topic.

what_makes_people_click.curiosity_gap: Show something that raises an unanswerable question. Jupiter from surface, $62.5B/mg price tag.
what_makes_people_click.recontextualization: Make familiar things unfamiliar. Small towns as horror, Jupiter as landscape.
what_makes_people_click.forbidden_knowledge: Imply suppressed/dangerous info. DO NOT JOIN, THEY LIED, FORBIDDEN.
what_makes_people_click.identity_challenge: Attack viewer's sacred beliefs. f*ck discipline, NOTHING MATTERS.
what_makes_people_click.aspiration_gap: Show gap between current and ideal state. DAY 1 vs DAY 21, GODFACE.
what_makes_people_click.specific_credibility: $306 not $300. 753 BC-1453 AD not 'ancient Rome'. Specificity = belief.
what_makes_people_click.visual_beauty_scroll_stop: Genuinely stunning image stops scroll before text is read.
what_makes_people_click.emotion_then_reason: Thumbnail triggers emotion (fear/awe/desire), title provides rational hook.
